历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2024, the minimum ranking for science was approximately 3879, and in 2025, it was about 4084, with a slight downward trend of about 205 positions over the past two years; the 2025 baseline is about 4084; the provincial science enrollment plan was 4 students from 2022 to 2024, increased to 5 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 3 students, a 40% reduction compared to 2025, which is a significant reduction, theoretically easing competition slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking approximately 79th, with recent rankings stable in the 73-82 range; in 2023, reputation was slightly negative (significant decline in admission rankings for minor language majors); in 2026, reputation remains slightly negative (involving academic misconduct and teacher ethics public opinion); Douyin popularity is relatively hot (overall ranking 39), with moderately high exposure; Foreign Language and Literature is A+, at the national top level, directly corresponding to the school's foreign language majors, providing strong appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Foreign language majors have seen a decline in social popularity in recent years; the total number of science examinees in the province in 2026 is approximately 163,000 (estimated based on the 2025 proportion), a significant increase of about 208% compared to 53,000 in 2025, intensifying competition. Combining the two offsetting factors of the 2025 baseline ranking of 4084, the significant 40% enrollment reduction in 2026 (easing competition), and the surge in Xinjiang science examinees by about 208% (intensifying competition), the boosting effect of the surge in examinees is significantly stronger than the easing effect of the enrollment reduction; it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will move forward compared to 2025 (ranking number decreases); the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 3154, with a range of 2654-3654.

学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; approximately 79th on the Soft Science main ranking, with recent rankings stable in the 73-82 range; in 2023, reputation was slightly negative (the admission rankings for minor language majors dropped significantly); in 2026, reputation remains slightly negative (involving academic misconduct and teacher ethics public opinion); Douyin popularity is relatively hot (ranked 39th overall), with moderate to high exposure; Foreign Language and Literature is A+, at the national top level, directly corresponding to the university's foreign language majors, providing strong appeal for related major applications.

It is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will move forward compared to 2025 (the ranking number decreases); the predicted minimum ranking is about 510, with a range of 418-602.
